subject: Referral request for Full Stack Developer at Amazon
body:
Hi ganesh,

I hope you're doing well. I noticed an opening for Full Stack Developer at Amazon. Based on my background, I believe I'd be a strong fit.

Would you be open to referring me?

Thanks,
Your Name
